title: Remove Date/Weather/Temperature from Project Information and Punch In/Out for Lead & Assistant Technicians

requirements.summary: Remove Date, Weather Condition, and Temperature fields from Project Information section
acceptanceCriteria: The Date field is no longer visible in the Project Information section.
The Weather Condition field is no longer visible in the Project Information section.
The Temperature field is no longer visible in the Project Information section.
Removing these fields does not break form submission, localStorage persistence, or PDF generation.
If these fields were previously persisted in localStorage, their keys are either ignored or cleaned up gracefully on load.

file_operations.description: Remove Date, Weather Condition, and Temperature field declarations from form state, remove their input elements from the Project Information section JSX, and ensure their removal does not affect other form fields or localStorage persistence logic for remaining fields.
Remove references to Date, Weather Condition, and Temperature fields from the PDF generation logic so these fields are no longer included in generated reports.

requirements.summary: Remove Punch In and Punch Out fields for Lead Technician and Assistant Technician
acceptanceCriteria: Punch In and Punch Out fields for Lead Technician are no longer visible in the form.
Punch In and Punch Out fields for Assistant Technician are no longer visible in the form.
Removing these fields does not break the overall form, other punch entries (if any), localStorage persistence, or PDF generation.
The PDF generator (pdfGenerator.ts) no longer includes Lead Technician or Assistant Technician punch times in the generated report.
Any previously stored punch data for Lead/Assistant Technician in localStorage is ignored or cleaned up gracefully on load.

file_operations.description: Remove Punch In and Punch Out state fields for Lead Technician and Assistant Technician from the form state, remove their corresponding date/time picker input elements from the Punch section JSX, and ensure localStorage persistence logic ignores or gracefully handles these removed fields.
Remove the Lead Technician and Assistant Technician punch time entries from the personnel punch times section of the PDF generation logic so these fields are no longer rendered in generated reports.
